world.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
world.summary: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided.

world.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
world.summary: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.

world.title: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
world.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.

world.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
world.summary: Nobody was seriously hurt as a result of the accident in the Spanish town, local authorities say.

world.title: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks
world.summary: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.

tech.title: The new Sonos Play has become my go-to desk and kitchen speaker
tech.summary: The new Sonos Play can act as a portable speaker inside and outside your home.

tech.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
tech.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

tech.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
tech.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

tech.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
tech.summary: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

tech.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
tech.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

denmark.title: Trump: Attacks in Beirut should not have happened
denmark.summary: US President Donald Trump has expressed his disapproval of the recent attacks in Beirut, calling them 'unacceptable'.

denmark.title: Churches offer same-sex marriages from June 26
denmark.summary: The Danish Church has announced that it will start offering same-sex marriages from June 26, following a recent change in the church's stance.

denmark.title: Israel attacks Hezbollah targets in Beirut
denmark.summary: Israel has launched airstrikes against Hezbollah targets in Beirut, sparking widespread condemnation and concern.

denmark.title: Switzerland rejects COVID-19 lockdown, citing low population density
denmark.summary: Switzerland has decided against imposing a nationwide lockdown to combat the spread of COVID-19, citing its low population density and relatively low infection rates.

denmark.title: Storm and arrests during Knicks' victory celebration in New York
denmark.summary: A severe storm swept through New York City, causing widespread damage and leading to several arrests during the celebration of the Knicks' recent victory.

greece.title: Τραμπ: Η πρωϊνή ετερεσχη στην Βηρυτό δεν ώπρεπε να είχε συμβεί
greece.summary: Ο Ντόναλυνδ Τραμπ επέκρινε το Ισραήλ για την επόμενη που πραγματος σήμερα στη Βηρυτό καλώντας το – όπως και την Χεζμπολάχ – να μην πραγματοςιήσει άλλες επιθέσεις σε κανένα τμήμα του Λιβάνου.

greece.title: Ένα βήμα πριν από την υπουπραφή συμφωνίας ΗΠΑ με Ιράν – «Αγκάθι» η ισραηλινή επόμενη στη νότια Βηρυτό
greece.summary: Μόνο οι υπογραφές μένουν, σύμφωνα με τον Ντόναλυντ Τραμω, για σιγήσουν τα όπλα στον Περσικό και να αρχίσουν οι συνοςγίες για τα κρίσιμα θέματα που οδήγησαν στη σρλαλαξη Ηπιμενιυν Πολιτειών και Ιράν.

sports.title: Χοντελίν: Παγκόσμιο ρεκόρ εφήβων στο μήκος με 8.46μ.
sports.summary: σημείωσε παγκόσμιο ρεκόρ εφήβων στο μήκος συ μίτινγκ στη Γαλλία.

sports.title: Άρης: Από νωρίς χαμός στο αεροδρόμιο για Σπανούλη
sports.summary: Ο Βασίλης Σπανούλης αναμένεται σύντομα στην Θεσσαλονίκη (η πτήση του προσγειώνεται στις 19:00) και μια ώρα πριν, πολλούς φίλοι του Άρη έχουν ήδη συγκεντρωθεί στο αεροδρόμιο «Μακεδονία» για να τον υποδ

sports.title: F1: Οι βαθμολογίες μετά το GP Ισπανίας
sports.summary: Η σειρά των τριών πρώτων στη βαθμολογία δεν άλλαξε μετά τη Βαρκελώνη, αλλά με τη νίκη του Χάμιλτον και την εγκατάλειψη του Αντολέλι έχουμε νέα δεδομένα στο πρωτάθλημα Formula 1.
